mapper.select: SELECT id, word, phonetic, meaning_cn, example_sentence, category, difficulty, visibility FROM vocabulary_entries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND wordbook_id = #{wordbookId} ORDER BY word ASC
SELECT id, word, meaning_cn FROM vocabulary_entries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND wordbook_id = #{wordbookId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT word FROM vocabulary_entries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id <> #{entryId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 12
SELECT meaning_cn FROM vocabulary_entries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id <> #{entryId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 12
SELECT word FROM vocabulary_entries WHERE visibility = 'PUBLIC' AND id <> #{entryId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 12
SELECT meaning_cn FROM vocabulary_entries WHERE visibility = 'PUBLIC' AND id <> #{entryId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 12
